label: CRM Software
benefitH2: What a modern CRM does for {industry} teams in {city}
benefitBullets: Centralises every enquiry from Google Sheets, CSV, ads, and manual walk-ins into one queue
Grades every lead A–F in under 500ms based on Fit, Intent, and Quality
Re-ranks the Priority Queue continuously as WhatsApp replies, calls, and signals arrive
Surfaces ₹ at risk per rep every Monday morning — coaching becomes a rupees conversation

label: Lead Management
benefitH2: How Leadkaun handles {industry} lead management in {city}
benefitBullets: Indian phone normalisation across +91 / 0-prefixed / spaced formats — no duplicate leads
Quality Score catches junk leads before reps waste time on them
Missed Opportunity Engine attaches ₹ value to every stale {industry} lead
Every call, WhatsApp, and email logged with timestamp — compliance-ready audit trail

label: Lead Scoring
benefitH2: Lead scoring that works for {industry} teams in {city}
benefitBullets: Three-dimensional scoring: Fit (ICP), Intent (engagement), Quality (data reliability)
Transparent weights — every rep can see why a lead is Grade A, not a black-box AI score
Intent decays automatically at −3 points/day when leads go silent — stale grades drop without manager intervention
{industry}-specific ICP templates built for Indian market defaults

label: Lead Tracking
benefitH2: Lead tracking built for the Indian {industry} workflow in {city}
benefitBullets: Priority Queue per rep — re-ranks in real time as new signals arrive
3-tap logging for calls and WhatsApp replies — rep flow doesn't break
Morning Brief at 8:30 AM IST sets the day before stand-up
Every interaction timestamped and exportable for compliance or audit

label: Sales Software
benefitH2: Sales software designed for Indian {industry} teams
benefitBullets: Not a CRM — a Sales Behaviour Operating System that reshapes what reps do next
60-minute setup with Indian B2B SMB defaults; first scored lead in the first hour
Pricing in ₹999–₹2,999/rep/month. No USD bills. No enterprise tax.
Built around WhatsApp as a first-class signal — not an after-thought integration

label: Sales Automation
benefitH2: What 'sales automation' should actually mean for {industry} in {city}
benefitBullets: Grade every lead automatically the moment it lands — no rep decision needed
Priority Queue builds itself every morning; re-ranks through the day
Follow-up cadence auto-generated per grade (Grade A: 3 touches in week 1; Grade B: weekly)
Missed Opportunity alerts auto-fire with ₹ value and one-tap recovery

label: Sales CRM
benefitH2: A sales CRM calibrated for {industry} reality in {city}
benefitBullets: {industry}-specific ICP templates — not generic US B2B defaults
WhatsApp tracking native (3-tap) — not a paid add-on
Indian deal values in lakhs and crores throughout the UI
Row-Level Security at DB level — reps see only assigned leads, managers see all

label: Lead Management Software
benefitH2: Lead management software for {industry} teams in {city}
benefitBullets: Import leads via Google Sheets (5-min polling), CSV upload (10k rows in under 60s), or manual entry
Grade A–F scoring with transparent three-dimensional breakdown

Morning Brief email to every rep and manager at 8:30 AM IST with ₹ at risk
